---
title: "Outputs"
format: html
date: 2026/03/12
date-format: long
date-modified: last-modified
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: sentence
---

## Papers

### 2026

- upcoming

## Presentations

### 2026

- **Mottl O.**, Flantua S.G.A.[Estimating Vegetation Change from Fossil Pollen to Planetary Boundaries :A Global, Long-Term Synthesis Using Big Data](https://ondrejmottl.github.io/TIBS-Presentation-20260107/)

## Posters

### 2026

- Flantua S.G.A.,**Mottl O.**,Felde V.A., Bhatta K.P., 
Birks H.H., Grytnes J., Seddon A.W., & Birks H.J.B.[_The workflow to process global palaeoecological data of fossil pollen for large-scale synthesis_](Mottl_poster_embed_fonts_rasterise.pdf) at [The International Biogeography(TIBS) 12th Biennial Conference, Aarhus,Denmark](https://conferences.au.dk/tibs-aarhus-2026/)

-  **Námešná N.** & **Mottl O.** [_Functional Vegetation Paleoecology:Mitigate the impact of climate change with data-driven insight from past vegetation_](poster_FVP_Aarhus.pdf) ath [The International Biogeography(TIBS) 12th Biennial Conference, Aarhus,Denmark](https://conferences.au.dk/tibs-aarhus-2026/)
   
- **Novio B.V.** & **Mottl O.** _A Comparative Analysis of Methodological Frameworks for Reconstructing Continental Diversity Trends of Vegetation: Case of the Northern Hemisphere during the Holocene_ at [The International Biogeography(TIBS) 12th Biennial Conference, Aarhus,Denmark](https://conferences.au.dk/tibs-aarhus-2026/)[![DOI](https://zenodo.org/badge/DOI/10.5281/zenodo.18734603.svg)](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18734603)
